g.title: Initial Sequence Number (SYN=1) or Accumulative Sequence Number (SYN=0)
Valid if ACK flag is set. Contains next expected sequence number.
Offset indicating the last urgent data byte

ul.li: Maximum Header: 60 Octets (Data Offset limit = 15 words)
Word Size: All fields aligned to 4-byte boundaries
Checksum: Covers pseudo-header (IP addresses, protocol, length)
